title: Rappenem's Reforge - Eating Animation
description: Rappenem's Reforge Addapted a Eating Animation
body:
### REMEMBER TO DOWNLOAD [RAPPENEM'S REFORGE CLICK HERE TO DOWNLOAD IT](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rappenems-reforge)
### AND [THEONE'S EATING ANIMATION PACK](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/theones-eating-animation-pack)
### VERSION 1.0.1
###  
### APPLESKIN INTEGRATION
![AppleSkin_Integration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be0c507b9756b7a13fa6a92f25af92b799335f7c.png)


### LOADING ORDER
![LOADING ORDER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18e126eb7db720c17a14aebd7514c0b3b8b00c26.png)

## **What does this resource pack do?**

> This resource pack modifies Eating animation textures to make them compatible with Rappenem's Reforge.

## Should I install AppleSkin? 
> No, I have made this integration because it is a mod that gives visibility to an existing mechanic in the game but invisible as a player (not to mention that it feels good to be able to see your food saturation)... And also because it is a mod that many people download, it is always at least in the top 10 of popularity.

Autor note: I created this because I love the resource pack, I feel like it has huge potential and I hope a lot of people can learn about it.
